description: Curated knowledge base for the Flourish coach. In production this is embedded into a vector store; in the prototype it grounds the coach's system prompts and is served here for transparency.

topics.title: ETFs & index funds
topics.summary: One purchase, hundreds of companies. Diversification for beginners without stock picking.

topics.title: Risk & diversification
topics.summary: Correlation measures how holdings move together. High correlation means your eggs share a basket.

topics.title: Compound interest
topics.summary: Growth on growth. Small early habits outweigh large late ones.

topics.title: IPOs, decoded
topics.summary: A private company selling shares to the public for the first time. Early hype often outruns reality.

topics.title: Salary negotiation
topics.summary: The first number anchors the range. Rehearsal beats improvisation.

topics.title: 401(k) & the match
topics.summary: An employer match is part of your compensation. Not claiming it is leaving pay behind.

topics.title: RSUs & equity pay
topics.summary: Pay in shares that vest over time. Vesting schedules shape when the money is really yours.

topics.title: Benefits, decoded
topics.summary: HSA, FSA, premiums, deductibles: the offer-letter alphabet, translated.

topics.title: The investing gap
topics.summary: Women start investing later and hold more cash. The gap is confidence-driven and closable.

topics.title: Women-led funds
topics.summary: FWOMX, SHE, and WOMN apply a gender-diversity lens to public markets.

topics.title: Talking money out loud
topics.summary: Scripts for joining money conversations that feel male-dominated.

topics.title: The Fed & rates
topics.summary: Rate decisions ripple into savings yields, loan costs, and stock valuations.

topics.title: Earnings season
topics.summary: Quarterly report cards. Prices move most when expectations meet reality.

topics.title: Market corrections
topics.summary: A 10 percent drop from a peak. Normal, frequent, and survivable with a long horizon.
